name: docx-to-md
description: Reliable DOCX to Markdown conversion with pluggable engine architecture

scripts.dev: npm run build && npm run serve
scripts.electron:dist: npm run electron:build && electron-builder --publish never --config electron-builder.yml
scripts.electron:dist:mac: npm run electron:build && electron-builder --publish never --mac --x64 --config electron-builder.yml && electron-builder --publish never --mac --arm64 --config electron-builder.yml
scripts.electron:dist:win: npm run electron:build && electron-builder --publish never --win --config electron-builder.yml
scripts.electron:dist:linux: npm run electron:build && electron-builder --publish never --linux --config electron-builder.yml
